hero.title: Senior Software Engineer | Scalable Systems | Cloud Architecture | AI Systems | Technical Leadership
about.title: About
about.paragraph1: Senior Software Engineer with extensive experience designing scalable platforms, microservice architectures, and cloud-native systems. I specialize in building reliable infrastructures that allow companies to scale from early startup stages to enterprise-grade platforms.
about.paragraph2: My expertise spans backend architecture, distributed systems, DevOps automation, and AI-powered applications. I build systems that are resilient, automated, and operationally efficient, reducing friction for both engineering teams and business operations.
about.paragraph3: On the frontend, I deliver high-performance web applications using React and Next.js, focusing on user experience, accessibility, and seamless integration with complex backend services and AI-driven systems.
about.paragraph4: I also design and deploy AI-powered solutions, including LLM-based services, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), vector search, and context-aware systems. I build infrastructure to optimize token usage, manage streaming responses, and integrate intelligent automation into production environments.
about.paragraph5: Beyond coding, I actively improve engineering processes, development workflows, and team collaboration, mentoring engineers and ensuring teams can deliver faster with higher reliability.
projects.title: Projects
projects.feen.name: Feen
projects.feen.subtitle: AI Accounting Platform
projects.feen.description: AI-powered accounting assistant for Belgian SMEs, helping entrepreneurs manage invoices, transactions, and financial insights in a single platform. Automates financial administration by combining document extraction, reconciliation, dashboards, and accounting collaboration tools.
projects.feen.achievement1: Designed and built the full SaaS architecture
projects.feen.achievement4: Built dashboards providing real-time financial insights
projects.feen.achievement5: Integrated Peppol readiness and company verification tools
projects.feen.achievement6: Developed scalable backend APIs and data pipelines
projects.feen.achievement7: Implemented LLM workflows for data processing and automation
projects.synq.name: Synq
projects.synq.subtitle: AI Agent Orchestration Platform
projects.synq.description: Workflow orchestration platform for AI-native software delivery, acting as the control plane between engineering teams and AI agents. Transforms unstructured AI usage into governed production pipelines.
projects.synq.feature1: DAG-based workflow orchestration for AI-driven development pipelines
projects.synq.feature2: Parallel AI agent execution across backend, frontend, QA, DevOps, and security
projects.synq.feature3: Quality gates with automated testing and validation before deployment
projects.synq.feature4: Sandboxed execution environments for safe experimentation
projects.synq.feature5: Role-based permissions and governance for AI-generated code
projects.synq.feature6: Cost intelligence tracking token usage and compute per agent
projects.synq.feature7: Failure detection with automated recovery and rollback
projects.synq.feature8: Plugin architecture supporting multiple AI providers

experience.title: Experience
experience.belfius.title: AI Systems Engineer
experience.belfius.description: Building AI systems within the strict constraints of a regulated bank — taking experimental AI technology and making it production-ready, secure, and compliant. Working closely with Architecture teams to ensure everything meets banking standards.
experience.belfius.achievement1: Designed retrieval systems that let LLMs access bank knowledge safely, using vector databases and hybrid search
experience.belfius.achievement2: Set up Azure infrastructure with proper security controls — managed identities, encryption, zero-trust policies
experience.belfius.achievement3: Created FastAPI services that connect AI models to enterprise data while maintaining strict access controls
experience.belfius.achievement4: Built AI agents that automate internal operations previously requiring manual work
experience.cohabs.title: Senior Software Engineer

experience.qover.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.qover.description: Part of the early technical team, helping transform Qover from a 13-person startup to a 150+ employee scale-up. Worked across all major systems ensuring the platform was scalable, automated, and built for long-term success.
